name: Rename one nav item, preserve the rest
prompt: Rename the 'Services' item in the top navigation menu to 'Solutions'. Leave all the other menu items exactly as they are.

setup.content:
site:
  name: "My Business"
  tagline: "The best in the business"
  primaryColor: "#4f46e5"
  bgEffect: ["grid", "aura", "hover"]
  logo: ""

contact:
  email: "hello@example.com"
  phone: ""

social:
  twitter: ""
  linkedin: ""
  instagram: ""

navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
  - label: "Services"
    url: "/services"
  - label: "Contact"
    url: "/contact"

analytics:
  enabled: true
  website_id: "da39a3ee-5e6b-4b0d-9c8a-c47c5d6e2e3a"

checks.judge: The 'Services' navigation item in settings.yaml was renamed to 'Solutions'. The three other pre-existing navigation entries — Home, About, and Contact — are all still present and unchanged. No navigation entry other than 'Services' was modified or removed.

dry_run.text: Renamed the 'Services' menu item to 'Solutions' in content/settings.yaml and left Home, About, and Contact unchanged.

edits.content/settings.yaml:
site:
  name: "My Business"
  tagline: "The best in the business"
  primaryColor: "#4f46e5"
  bgEffect: ["grid", "aura", "hover"]
  logo: ""

contact:
  email: "hello@example.com"
  phone: ""

social:
  twitter: ""
  linkedin: ""
  instagram: ""

navigation:
  - label: "Home"
    url: "/"
  - label: "About"
    url: "/about"
  - label: "Solutions"
    url: "/services"
  - label: "Contact"
    url: "/contact"

analytics:
  enabled: true
  website_id: "da39a3ee-5e6b-4b0d-9c8a-c47c5d6e2e3a"
